import pandas as pd, json
cases = pd.DataFrame(var_call_HXR79d5JGiPJTMHQlU9w5DPn)
# Normalize accountid by stripping leading '#'
cases['accountid_clean'] = cases['accountid'].str.lstrip('#')
cases['createddate'] = pd.to_datetime(cases['createddate'])
cases['closeddate'] = pd.to_datetime(cases['closeddate'])
# Filter to past 6 quarters relative to 2022-10-26
cutoff = pd.Timestamp('2022-10-26') - pd.DateOffset(quarters=6)
cases = cases[(cases['createddate'] >= cutoff) & (cases['createddate'] <= pd.Timestamp('2022-10-26'))]
# Compute closure time in hours
cases['closure_hours'] = (cases['closeddate'] - cases['createddate']).dt.total_seconds() / 3600.0
result = cases.to_json(orient='records')
print("__RESULT__:")
print(result)

import pandas as pd, json
cases = pd.DataFrame(var_call_HXR79d5JGiPJTMHQlU9w5DPn)
cases['accountid_clean'] = cases['accountid'].str.lstrip('#')
cases['createddate'] = pd.to_datetime(cases['createddate'])
cases['closeddate'] = pd.to_datetime(cases['closeddate'])
# Manually compute 6 quarters (~18 months) before 2022-10-26
cutoff = pd.Timestamp('2022-10-26') - pd.DateOffset(months=18)
cases = cases[(cases['createddate'] >= cutoff) & (cases['createddate'] <= pd.Timestamp('2022-10-26'))]
cases['closure_hours'] = (cases['closeddate'] - cases['createddate']).dt.total_seconds() / 3600.0
result = cases.to_json(orient='records')
print("__RESULT__:")
print(result)

val_args.code:
import pandas as pd, json
cases = pd.DataFrame(var_call_HXR79d5JGiPJTMHQlU9w5DPn)
cases['accountid_clean'] = cases['accountid'].str.lstrip('#')
cases['createddate'] = pd.to_datetime(cases['createddate']).dt.tz_localize(None)
cases['closeddate'] = pd.to_datetime(cases['closeddate']).dt.tz_localize(None)
cutoff = pd.Timestamp('2021-04-26')
end = pd.Timestamp('2022-10-26')
cases = cases[(cases['createddate'] >= cutoff) & (cases['createddate'] <= end)]
cases['closure_hours'] = (cases['closeddate'] - cases['createddate']).dt.total_seconds() / 3600.0
result = cases.to_json(orient='records')
print("__RESULT__:")
print(result)

import pandas as pd, json
cases = pd.DataFrame(json.loads(var_call_yhION5L4L0Grw72J9QTwoEOR))
accounts = pd.DataFrame(var_call_1zg7ejxsHAtn6eHBeqWwFMjO)
accounts['Id_clean'] = accounts['Id'].str.lstrip('#')
merged = cases.merge(accounts, left_on='accountid_clean', right_on='Id_clean', how='left')
state_stats = merged.groupby('ShippingState')['closure_hours'].mean().dropna().sort_values()
best_state = state_stats.index[0] if len(state_stats) else None
import json as js
result = js.dumps({'best_state': best_state})
print("__RESULT__:")
print(result)

val_args.code:
import pandas as pd, json
cases = pd.DataFrame(var_call_yhION5L4L0Grw72J9QTwoEOR)
accounts = pd.DataFrame(var_call_1zg7ejxsHAtn6eHBeqWwFMjO)
accounts['Id_clean'] = accounts['Id'].str.lstrip('#')
merged = cases.merge(accounts, left_on='accountid_clean', right_on='Id_clean', how='left')
state_stats = merged.groupby('ShippingState')['closure_hours'].mean().dropna().sort_values()
best_state = state_stats.index[0] if len(state_stats) else None
import json as js
result = js.dumps({'best_state': best_state})
print("__RESULT__:")
print(result)
